revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:مقاطعة أكي (هيروشيما)]][[ceb:Aki-gun (distrito sa Hapon)]][[de:Aki-gun (Hiroshima)]][[en:Aki District, Hiroshima]][[es:Distrito de Aki (Hiroshima)]][[fa:شهرستان آکای، هیروشیما]][[fi:Akin piirikunta (Hiroshima)]][[fr:District d'Aki (Hiroshima)]][[id:Distrik Aki, Hiroshima]][[it:Distretto di Aki (Hiroshima)]][[ja:安芸郡 (広島県)]][[ko:아키군 (히로시마현)]][[pl:Powiat Aki (Hiroszima)]][[pt:Aki (distrito)]][[uk:Повіт Акі (Хіросіма)]][[zh:安藝郡 (廣島縣)]]
{{Short description|District in Hiroshima, Japan|qq=}} {{unreferenced|date=June 2009|qq=}} {{coord|34.3532|N|132.5574|E|display=title|region:JP-34_type:adm2nd|qq=}} [[File:Aki District in Hiroshima Prefecture.svg|thumb|Location of Aki District in Hiroshima Prefecture]] {{nihongo|'''Aki'''|安芸郡|Aki-gun|qq=}} is a {{ill|Districts of Japan|en|Districts of Japan|qid=Q1122846|lt=district|1=Districts of Japan}}, and is within the {{ill|Minami-ku, Hiroshima|en|Minami-ku, Hiroshima|qid=Q63442|lt=Minami-ku, Hiroshima|1=Minami-ku, Hiroshima}} ward, {{ill|Ward (electoral subdivision)|en|Ward (electoral subdivision)|qid=Q1195098|lt=Ward (electoral subdivision)|1=Ward (electoral subdivision)}}, one of the eight wards that comprise the Hiroshima {{ill|Prefecture|en|Prefecture|qid=Q515716|lt=Prefecture|1=Prefecture}}, in {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. 'Minami', is Japanese for 'South'. 'Ku', is loosely suggestive of a division, such as 'compartment', 'boundary', etc.. It is the location of {{ill|Mazda|en|Mazda|qid=Q35996|lt=Mazda|1=Mazda}}'s {{ill|Hiroshima (Mazda factory)|en|Hiroshima (Mazda factory)|qid=Q5771173|lt=automobile factory|1=Hiroshima (Mazda factory)}} which has been on the site since the early 1930s. As of 1798 population data but counting decreases due to the March 20, 2005 merger, the district has an estimated {{ill|Population|en|Population|qid=Q2625603|lt=Population|1=Population}} of 116,573 and a {{ill|Population density|en|Population density|qid=Q22856|lt=density|1=Population density}} of 1588 persons per km<sup>2</sup>. The total area is 73.41 km<sup>2</sup>. == Towns and villages == *{{ill|Fuchū, Hiroshima (town)|en|Fuchū, Hiroshima (town)|qid=Q1204737|lt=Fuchū|1=Fuchū, Hiroshima (town)}} *{{ill|Kaita, Hiroshima|en|Kaita, Hiroshima|qid=Q1347353|lt=Kaita|1=Kaita, Hiroshima}} *{{ill|Kumano, Hiroshima|en|Kumano, Hiroshima|qid=Q1204741|lt=Kumano|1=Kumano, Hiroshima}} *{{ill|Saka, Hiroshima|en|Saka, Hiroshima|qid=Q1351062|lt=Saka|1=Saka, Hiroshima}} ==Mergers== {{Portal|Japan|qq=}} *On April 1, 2003, the town of [[:en:Shimokamigari, Hiroshima|Shimokamigari]] was merged into the city of {{ill|Kure, Hiroshima|en|Kure, Hiroshima|qid=Q223439|lt=Kure|1=Kure, Hiroshima}}. *On November 1, 2004, the town of Etajima absorbed the towns of {{ill|Nōmi, Hiroshima|en|Nōmi, Hiroshima|qid=Q7071611|lt=Nōmi|1=Nōmi, Hiroshima}}, {{ill|Ōgaki, Hiroshima|en|Ōgaki, Hiroshima|qid=Q8081457|lt=Ōgaki|1=Ōgaki, Hiroshima}} and {{ill|Okimi, Hiroshima|en|Okimi, Hiroshima|qid=Q7082007|lt=Okimi|1=Okimi, Hiroshima}}, from {{ill|Saeki District, Hiroshima|en|Saeki District, Hiroshima|qid=Q7398293|lt=Saeki District|1=Saeki District, Hiroshima}}, to become the new city of {{ill|Etajima, Hiroshima|en|Etajima, Hiroshima|qid=Q865506|lt=Etajima|1=Etajima, Hiroshima}}. *On March 20, 2005, the towns of {{ill|Ondo, Hiroshima|en|Ondo, Hiroshima|qid=Q11664189|lt=Ondo|1=Ondo, Hiroshima}}, {{ill|Kurahashi, Hiroshima|en|Kurahashi, Hiroshima|qid=Q6445524|lt=Kurahashi|1=Kurahashi, Hiroshima}} and {{ill|Kamagari, Hiroshima|en|Kamagari, Hiroshima|qid=Q6355257|lt=Kamagari|1=Kamagari, Hiroshima}} were merged into {{ill|Kure, Hiroshima|en|Kure, Hiroshima|qid=Q223439|lt=Kure|1=Kure, Hiroshima}}. ==References== {{Reflist|qq=}} {{Hiroshima|qq=}} <{{Hiroshima-geo-stub|qq=}}
[[en:Aki District, Hiroshima]] <!--enwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[ar:مقاطعة أكي (هيروشيما)]] [[ceb:Aki-gun (distrito sa Hapon)]] [[de:Aki-gun (Hiroshima)]] [[es:Distrito de Aki (Hiroshima)]] [[fa:شهرستان آکای، هیروشیما]] [[fi:Akin piirikunta (Hiroshima)]] [[fr:District d'Aki (Hiroshima)]] [[id:Distrik Aki, Hiroshima]] [[it:Distretto di Aki (Hiroshima)]] [[ja:安芸郡 (広島県)]] [[ko:아키군 (히로시마현)]] [[pl:Powiat Aki (Hiroszima)]] [[pt:Aki (distrito)]] [[uk:Повіт Акі (Хіросіма)]] [[zh:安藝郡 (廣島縣)]] {{wikidata link|Q1351074}} [[Category:Districts in Hiroshima Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:History of Kure, Hiroshima]] [[Category:Saka, Hiroshima]] [[Category:安芸区の歴史]] [[Category:安芸国の郡]] [[Category:安芸郡 (広島県)]] [[Category:広島市南区の歴史]] [[Category:広島市東区の歴史]] [[Category:Fuchū, Hiroshima (town)]] [[Category:江田島市の歴史]] [[Category:Kaita, Hiroshima]] [[Category:熊野町]]
